title: Warwick Township Pump Track Public-Comment Rehearsal / Reconstruction
published_title: Not supplied in the accessible source bundle
location: Rehearsal/reconstruction setting; not the Warwick Township meeting room
summary: A recreation of Kyle A. Huffman’s Warwick Township pump-track public comment prepared or recorded outside the actual government meeting. It preserves the intended presentation and advocacy message but is not meeting footage.
historical_significance: Documents the Lititz BMX-led advocacy process for a Warwick Township pump track while clearly separating a later recreation from the official public-meeting record.
transcript_status: No transcript was supplied for this rehearsal/reconstruction recording.
rights: All rights reserved unless separately documented; see docs/rights-and-access.md.
notes: Locked wording: rehearsal/reconstruction, not actual Warwick Township meeting footage.
No statement in this dossier should imply that the supplied recording is an official township video.
